feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SD
entry.content: Resolvido

entry.title: Issue with Zero Net Value in Sales Order After Updating Billing Plan Using BAPIs
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently facing an issue with our sales order creation process. Here's the sequence of BAPIs we are using:

1.DIPCOL_COLLECTIVE_RRB
2.BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
For billing plan updates, we are using:
3.SD_VBKD_READ_WITH_VBELN
4.BILLING_SCHEDULE_READ
5.BILLING_SCHEDULE_SAVE


With this logic, we are able to create and update sales orders, and the billing plan updates perfectly. However, the sales orders are being created with a zero net value. If we exclude the billing plan-related BAPIs (SD_VBKD_READ_WITH_VBELN, BILLING_SCHEDULE_READ, BILLING_SCHEDULE_SAVE), the net value of the sales order calculates correctly.

We have already raised an OSS message, and SAP replied that the FM SD_SALES_BILLINGPLAN_CHANGE is not released. They suggested discussing the issue with an other SAP consultant or making use of the SAP Community.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or have suggestions on how to resolve this?

Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Sales order specific PO to vendor based on intercompany PO
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to achieve a situation where 1. We have a customer order on Plant A. 2. we have the intercompany PO between Plant A and Plant B. 3. We raise a PO to vendor from plant B. 4. We are expecting both the intercompany PO and vendor PO should have the sales order in the account assignment. 

We are using strategy group 20 in the material master for plant A and the intercompany PO is linked to the sales order through requirement type KE. But even if we use strategy group 20 or 40 or 50 for plant B, the PO to the vendor from plant B does not have the sales order link and the stock is going to generic stock once we receive the goods from vendor. Any idea how can we make the PO to vendor from plant B account assigned to sales order in this intercompany situation? Please note the direct customer order at plant B does have the sales order reference; only issue with the intercompany situation.

Thanks, Anupam

entry.title: what activities are required from SD end merge one plant to another plant of different company code
entry.content:
Requirement is , that plant X (company code CC01)  is merging with Plant Y of company code CC02 so please help in to identify the activities required to perform from SD perspective 

what set of configuration , assignment will be done for this activity

entry.title: SD/EWM Real Open Quantities in Sales Schedule Agreement / Schedule Lines
entry.content:
Hi SAP Masters,

I am a recent SAP S4HANA Public Cloud User with EWM and found out that in SAP universe, when there is an Outbound Delivery created, this reduces our Open Quantity as if this was already shipped, but since it is only created and we are waiting for the truck to arrive, it is a bit misleading to say that the quantity is already delivered, could anyone share any suggestion on how to tackle this simple problem?

We would like to know all real open quantities, not 1 by 1 check.

To be able to check also our real backlog with our customers

entry.title: T-code : FD32 Run time error for change credit account.
entry.content: I encountered an issue when attempting to change the credit account using transaction code FD32. The process took an unusually long time to save, and ultimately resulted in a runtime error.I attempted to implement note 99937 - Credit Management: Runtime error TIME_OUT, but unfortunately, the issue continues to persist. Can you suggest any alternative methods for recommending solutions?

entry.title: Requirement to trigger the workflow based on pricing communication data during Sales Order Create
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We have a requirement to trigger the workflow based on pricing communication data. We created the workflow and implemented Badi SD_APM_SET_APPROVAL_REASON but it doesn't have pricing communication as importing and even standard CDS available for pricing will not return the pricing data during first time create of sales order as it is not created yet. There are blog that says about the data to be transferred from Order Item to Pricing, however is there any business process that would pass on the data from pricing communication to item of the order. Just FYI, order item has subtotal fields available to aggregate the values from the pricing procedure but all of them are occupied. Unfortunately, I couldn't find any solution for this yet. Have anyone came across such requirement and able to crack, request your inputs on it.

Best,

HP

entry.title: Unable to populate data in sales order AVC using power automate & scripting
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I stuck at point where I am unable to automate the sales order creation process using MS power automate.

The Sales order item is AVC configurable.

The nitial GUI Screen data entry done well. When I go for AVC Screen data entry It dont work. 

Power Automate Error - Failed to write in textbox (Textbox wasn't found)

Text to fill in - %CurrentItem['CHARECTERISTIC']%

entry.title: Italy edocument - eInvoice with Partner solution - EDOC_ADAPTOR~SET_OUTPUT_DATA
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have implemented BADI EDOC_ADAPTOR and method SET_OUTPUT_DATA and made the custom logic. Changed the values in the structure CS_OUTPUT_DATA. But after upgrading it to EHP8. We are unable to get the XML structure in the change parameter CS_OUTPUT_DATA. 

After EHP8 upgrade, XML version is 1.2.1 and AIF version is 4.

Does anyone have any idea please?

Thanks and Regards,

Sivanantham.

entry.title: Letter of Credit Management (49D) Integration with SD module
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private edition.  Could you please advise whether Scope Item (49D) includes Integration with Sales Module (SD module) Functionality. 

Also, please advise whether scope item (49D) is available for India.

We need to assign Financial Transaction (Letter of Credit - Receivable) created in FTR_CREATE  in Sales Order. 

Further based on this assignment, we need to have controls based on Letter of Credit (LC) validity and value in the subsequent process of sales order like Delivery & Billing document. 

Could you please advise whether this is possible in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: How to Deactivate a Sales Employee in Master Data?
entry.content:
I created a sales employee master record using T-Code: VPE1

One of the sales employees has already left the company.

Can I deactivate this employee in the master record to prevent them from being selected in other areas, such as the Partner Function in the customer master data?

entry.title: SAP SD Avalibality Check rule
entry.content:
i have created a salse order with 8 line iteams but in delivery there are only 5 line iteam

I need all line iteam to be copied to delivery irrespective of stock avalibality

SAP Gurus pls help

entry.title: Fetched wrong gross weight for batch split line item in OBD in S&D sap
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

System is calculating gross weight wrong & randomly for the first batch split line item in outbound delivery in sap. This is for some of the cases only. Can any one explain why this scenario occurs. Please note we have WM integrated with SAP.

entry.title: 000010 : Enter cancellation proced. Message No. VU001
entry.content: I'm getting this warning message while creating rental contract. Can anyone help me on this?

entry.title: cds based code list Custom field added by fiori to sales pricing search help not working in VK11?
entry.content:
I added a custom field for pricing in SD using the Fiori app, and linked a CDS view(I_Storagelocation) for the search help. The search help works fine in Fiori, but it's not showing in the SAP GUI transaction VK11. The field itself is visible in VK11, but no search help is available. Additionaly in KONP structure no search help available. How can I add search help for VK11 to for this field. 

 

Fiori App:

GUI:

entry.title: Billing block in VD05 is not copied to sales order.
entry.content: Billing block in VD05 is not copied to sales order.

entry.title: Group condition discount
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus please i have a scenario where i have lets say three line items of 3 different materials with the same material pricing group.

For two of them i have set up a discount  scale in vk11 I set up a discount condition type (calculation type - quantity and quantity scale based), i set it as header condition, item condition, group condition and tried to assign the group condition routine 1, 2 and 3 as well. Now i want the system to set the discount amount (according to scales) according to the cumulative amount of all three items (not just the two that have the condition type present in the line items). The cumulation works for the two that have the discount condition type but the third is left out can you please help?

entry.title: Error during copy of partner: Partner role SH. Message no. VL864
entry.content:
Hi, I'm getting an unusual error when doing the Goods Issue (261) Production order. It's an independent Production order without sales order or forecast, it was manually created production order, but the error doesn't make sense. It's asking for Partner role SH missing. Could you please help?

  1. Transaction MIGO
  2. Goods issue 261 
  3. Enter Production order
  4. Set flag "ITEM OK"
  5. Click on "Check" button (Document is ok)
  6. Click on "Post" button
  7. The system issues the below error:

Error during copy of partner: Partner role SH. Message no. VL864

entry.title: Intercompany sales during SAP Hana S/4 migration
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Our company is in the midst of migration to SAP Hana S/4 from ECC 6.0

We are operating in all European countries and  the migration is planned in phases/waves. Current scenario we have multiple company codes and plants in all EU locations running on a single instance of ECC 6

so my question is if we are selling from say Belgium with the delivering plant in France( current scenario) and in the first phase only Belgium CoCode will be migrated to S/4, how do we manages sales with the delivering plant being in France( on old ECC system) not being visible to Belgium Sales Area ( on the new S/4 system)?

This is only one scenario and the reverse situation will also occur with sales from France Sales org( on ECC) being delivered from Belgium plant ( on S/4) 

So we will have two system running in parallel during transition, with no stock visibility between each other, how can this be managed ? 

Please if anyone has been in this situation can share how it was managed ?

Thank you for your responses

Kind Regards

Apoorva

entry.title: order_headers_out-currency value
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can anyone help me with this query

In BAPISDORDER_GETDETAILEDLIST from which standard field is order_headers_out-currency fetched
